item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p11","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested additional template field, explicitly recognizes the prior three cases as the same repeated local-patch pattern, and warns that continuing would turn the template into an exception bin. It refuses making the field part of the normal template baseline, allows only a bounded one-day emergency marker, and moves upstream to a consolidated pre-interview/offer checklist with deletion/closure conditions. This satisfies the anti-spiral ownership and avoids the fail signal of directly adding another permanent field."}
